reviews.review_msg: Rejean Canac-Marquis is great at explaining things, clearly cares a lot for his students, and the course was overall really good. The lectures can get really boring and repetitive though, especially since much of it is just reviewing the stuff from the assigned textbook readings and exercises.

Contrary to others, I enjoyed Rejean ! He was really engaging and I always looked forward to his lectures. I will say that there was a lot of course material. As someone who speaks French well, I did not have a problem other than memorizing certain terms. I could tell that everyone else had trouble keeping up. The average on assignments was 73 %.
David is an amazing prof! He helps his students and he is very kind and understanding.

The course is awful, but he is not. I find him very kind and approachable. He is readily available during office hours and his criteria is very clear. Its not his fault FREN304, advanced French grammar, is a nightmare. He is definitely trying his best. There are like 8 quizzes, 3 homework assignments, 3 tests and a final so beware of that.
